ability.pa_reverie.caisson.description: Channel against the deep and the sea yields, parting into a hollow of air around you — room to breathe, and to build. But the sea only lends the space; before long the waters return to claim the hollow once more.
ability.pa_reverie.canopy_leap.descripti: Bound to the crown of the tree in your sights and settle gently among its leaves — the quick way to fell a tall trunk from the top down.
ability.pa_reverie.conjure_food.descript: Pull a fleeting meal out of raw magic. The deeper your mastery, the finer the meal you conjure — but such food is only half-real, and soon fades from existence.
ability.pa_reverie.deepsight.description: Borrow the deep stone's sight to pierce the gloom of caves and the Nether. Must be cast far underground or in the Nether.
ability.pa_reverie.escape_shaft.descript: Channel a long, quiet ritual. When it completes, you drift upward through stone and earth until you break into open sky. The world remains unchanged where you passed.
ability.pa_reverie.excavate.description: Drive your will into the earth and tear away the soft ground before you. Everything a shovel could dig — soil, sand, gravel, clay — is cleared from your feet upward, never below. Master it and the spoils leap straight into your hands.
ability.pa_reverie.fathoms_eye.descripti: Borrow the depths' clarity to pierce the watery gloom. Must be cast while in water.
ability.pa_reverie.feast_of_life.descrip: Draw the sustenance from the food in your hand and let it mend you outright. Its nourishment closes your wounds, while its richness wraps you in a shielding fullness. The heartier the meal — and the finer its quality — the greater the feast.
ability.pa_reverie.hunters_mark.descript: Sharpen your senses to the life around you. Nearby creatures stand outlined through wall and wood, for your eyes alone. As your mastery deepens the mark reaches farther and reveals more — first the beasts, then every timid creature, and at its height the monsters that lurk and the rivals that hunt beside you.
ability.pa_reverie.mend.description: Channel restoration into the tool or armor held in either hand. The longer you sustain the song, the more it mends.
ability.pa_reverie.peaceful_reverie.desc: Sit at the water's edge and channel a quiet ritual. The reverie sharpens your luck and dulls mobs' awareness of you. Move even a little and the peace breaks.
ability.pa_reverie.rain_dance.descriptio: Root yourself and call down a gathering rain. For its duration the soil drinks deep and the crops around you surge toward harvest.
ability.pa_reverie.restful_meditation.de: Settle in and breathe. While you hold perfectly still, the meditation mends your body, eases your hunger, and quickens the flow of mana. Move even a little and the calm breaks.
ability.pa_reverie.shepherds_aura.descri: Take up the crook and the flock answers. Animals nearby gather to your side, their wounds closing and their hides hardened against harm — and at the height of your mastery they move with quickened step. Tamer and herder alike walk easier under the shepherd's care.
ability.pa_reverie.transmute.description: Hold a stack of base material and channel the working. Over ten seconds the matter is rewoven into another form — iron into gold, and rarer conversions as your mastery deepens. The toll afterward varies with what you reshape.
ability.pa_reverie.tremor_sense.descript: Send a quiet pulse into the earth. Anything worth digging — ores, suspicious sand and gravel, ancient debris — answers back, briefly outlined through stone.
ability.pa_reverie.verdant_cascade.descr: Target a ripe crop. The harvest spreads outward from it, reaping and replanting each fully-grown crop it can reach. The bounty flies to your inventory.
ability.pa_reverie.woodsong.description: Sing to the grown trees within reach. Each one shares its gift — logs, leaves, sticks, and saplings — and remains standing where it grew.
message.pa_reverie.caisson_no_water: The caisson can only be raised in water
message.pa_reverie.canopy_leap_no_landin: No room to land atop the canopy
message.pa_reverie.canopy_leap_too_tall: The canopy is out of reach
message.pa_reverie.deepsight_too_shallow: You must be deeper underground to invoke Deepsight
message.pa_reverie.escape_shaft_not_deep: The shaft only answers from deep underground
message.pa_reverie.fathoms_eye_no_water: You must be in water to invoke Fathom's Eye
message.pa_reverie.feast_of_life_no_food: Hold food to feast upon it
message.pa_reverie.mend_nothing_to_mend: Hold a damaged tool or armor to mend it
message.pa_reverie.peaceful_reverie_no_w: The reverie needs calm water before you
message.pa_reverie.transmute_no_recipe: Hold a stack this working can reshape
message.pa_reverie.verdant_cascade_no_cr: Target a ripe crop to begin the cascade
tooltip.pa_reverie.food_fading: This food is fading from existence.
